title: Tableau: Airbnb Market Analysis
description: An advanced Tableau project analyzing Airbnb short-term rental data (Madrid listings) to guide real estate investment decisions. A Python cleaning script preprocesses raw listing data before visualization. The final dashboard uses parameter controls, filters, custom navigation, and interactive actions to surface pricing trends, occupancy patterns, and neighborhood-level insights for potential investors.
shortDescription: Advanced Tableau dashboard on Airbnb Madrid listings for short-term rental investment analysis.
